entity.summary: Abstract-native decentralized exchange entity consolidating AMM, concentrated-liquidity, and V3 discovery surfaces around the current Aborean Finance application.
entity.notes: The current first-party application remains reachable. HEI consolidates Aborean AMM, Aborean CL, and Aborean Finance V3 discovery representations into one exchange entity rather than version- or pool-model-specific entities. Current exchange discovery sources independently preserve the Abstract DEX identity and app.aborean.finance domain.

evidence.title: Aborean Finance official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application remains reachable and preserves the live Aborean Finance exchange surface.

evidence.title: Aborean DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves Aborean AMM and Aborean CL representations on Abstract; HEI consolidates them under one entity-first Aborean Finance record.

evidence.title: Aborean Finance V3 exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange discovery data preserves the Aborean Finance V3 identity and app.aborean.finance domain, supporting consolidation with the AMM and CL source representations.
